findings.evidence: `rg` hits show only this new file mentions the subsingleton API: lines 36 and 54; the roadmap target at `UniversalCovers/README.md:100-106` asks to consume Mathlib's lifting criterion and note the simply-connected special case, not expose a generalized subsingleton interface.
findings.fix: Make the subsingleton helper lemmas `private` or inline their proofs, leaving only the simply-connected public API needed to feed `IsCoveringMap.existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_range_le`.
findings.issue: `FundamentalGroup.map_range_eq_bot_of_subsingleton` and `map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_subsingleton` are public generalized helper lemmas, but the stated downstream target only needs the simply-connected lifting range condition.

summary: The replacement removes the bespoke lift predicate, but the new public module exposes generalized subsingleton helper lemmas that are not part of the roadmap lifting API. Keep the simply-connected range fact needed by the Mathlib lifting criterion and hide proof scaffolding.
